description: INTERMEDIATE SNAPSHOT -- not the final solved sets. Indexes of miniF2F Test theorems (LeanDojo traced-theorem order, 244 theorems) proved by each model in the W=3, K=10, N=10 evaluation, as exported from the cluster comparison script (objects/compare_proof_indexes.py) BEFORE the final passes completed. This snapshot reflects 98 (bfs_prover) / 44 (unigram) / 50 (trigram) solved theorems; the final aggregated counts reported in the README are 121 / 64 / 54. The final per-pass logs live on the university cluster and are not distributed with this repository. See notebooks/analysis.ipynb for the snapshot-level overlap analysis and docs/methodology.md (Limitations) for the caveat.
